name: FIGX Capital Acquisition Corp.
business: FIGX Capital Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. It is concentrating its efforts on identifying businesses in the financial industry group (FIG) sector, focusing on differentiated private wealth/asset managers. The company has generated no operating revenues to date and expects none until a business combination is completed.

exposures.sentence: Fintech enabling efficient automation of processes, leveraging big data analytics and user-friendly digital platforms for client interaction to make informed investment decisions ultimately improving the overall client experience and reducing operational costs.
Streamlining and scaling operations via application of enabling IT/AI (research/synthesis, reporting, compliance, back-office operations, customer service, and development/IT operations).
integration of financial information services providing tools for highly specialized and highly regulated tasks (e.g., FactSet, Moody’s S&P Global, Fair Issac, Experian comparables);

cyber incidents or attacks directed at us or third parties could result in information theft, data corruption, operational disruption and/or financial loss, as well as impact our ability to consummate an initial Business Combination;

catalysts.event: Complete initial Business Combination by deadline
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) June 30, 2027, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
